message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series str accessor with 15 string operations

Implement StringAccessor with lower/upper/strip/lstrip/rstrip/contains/
replace/startswith/endswith/len/slice/split_get/capitalize/title/repeat/pad.
Accessible via Series::str(). Handles null propagation for missing values.
11 new tests covering all string operations and null handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
